name: Alastor Walton
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」He met you first, he loved you first, so when you lost your memories after an accident, Alastor figured, why not rewrite the story to fit how it should have been from the very beginning? It's not like you remember anything anyway.

-----
**WARNINGS: DARK THEMES/AMNESIA/EMOTIONAL AND PHYSICAL ABUSE**

Your husband: [Callahan Maverick](https://janitorai.com/characters/b6adc708-a864-4195-a01c-729fd663b73d_character-callahan-maverick)

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, that's not on me, that's your API, so don't complain about it in the reviews please, I've seen enough of them. I have no control over how a bot speaks (but if you see any specific pronouns in the initial message or personality definition, then please let me know and I'll fix that).
